signals.raw:
Bitcoin Surpasses $78K, Highest Since February 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin has climbed above **$78,000** on April 18, 2026, marking its highest price since February amid strong spot ETF inflows ($1.1B last week), a $537M short squeeze, and Iran peace signals reducing geopolitical risk.[1][4]
